metadata.name: Extend a Logical Volume
metadata.description: Extend the storage of an existing logical volume and extend the file system to use the available storage
objectives: Extend the storage of an existing logical volume
Extend the file system of a logical volume to use the available storage

tasks.name: Verify third LVM partition exists
tasks.description: The /dev/sdb3 partition should exist with LVM flag
tasks.failure_message: Third LVM partition /dev/sdb3 does not exist or lacks LVM flag
hints: Set LVM flag: sudo parted /dev/sdb set 3 lvm on

tasks.name: Verify /dev/sdb3 is a physical volume
tasks.description: The /dev/sdb3 partition should be an LVM physical volume
hints: Verify with: sudo pvs or sudo pvdisplay /dev/sdb3

tasks.name: Verify vg_servera includes /dev/sdb3
tasks.description: The vg_servera volume group should include /dev/sdb3
tasks.failure_message: Volume group vg_servera does not include /dev/sdb3
hints: Extend VG with: sudo vgextend vg_servera /dev/sdb3
Verify with: sudo pvs (check VG column for sdb3)

tasks.name: Verify lv_servera is 700 MiB
tasks.description: The lv_servera logical volume should be extended to 700 MiB
tasks.failure_message: Logical volume lv_servera is not 700 MiB

tasks.name: Verify XFS filesystem is extended
tasks.description: The XFS filesystem on /data should use the extended LV space
tasks.failure_message: XFS filesystem has not been extended to use new space
hints: Note: XFS can only be grown while mounted

tasks.name: Verify /data contains configuration files
tasks.description: The /data directory should contain the copied configuration files
hints: Files should have been copied in the previous lvm-create exercise
